expectations.text: Uses the * join operator (not nested restrictions)
expectations.evidence: Uses `joined = RippleTimesV1 * ClusterlessDecodingV1` natural join and contrasts it with restriction-based approaches.

expectations.text: Addresses row multiplication (unique nwb_file_name via set() or distinct)
expectations.evidence: `sessions = set(joined.fetch("nwb_file_name"))` with explanation 'A given session can produce many rows ... so deduplicate'; offers `dj.U` alternative.
